title: EBYT`s Vanilla PVP
description: A simple PVP resource pack without those weird textures and color changing that most PVP resource packs do.
body:
# EBYT`s Vanilla PVP
This is a simple Vanilla+ resource pack that changes the old 1.8 textures to the new 1.14+ ones, makes items appear smaller in hand and a lot more!
## Additions & Changes
- Updates **all** item textures to the modern Minecraft counterparts.
- Updates **some** block textures to the modern Minecraft counterparts.
- Removes rain & snow particles.
- Removes pumpkin and underwater overlay.
- Makes the block breaking animation look more simple and understandable.
- Makes wool look more depictable.
- Makes items appear smaller in hand.
- Makes swords shorter.
- Makes fire shorter.
- Makes GUI transparent.
## Notes
Check the changelog to see find out about all the bugs, because the resource pack is still in beta.
